titleStmt.title: SII 8.67: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 67. (A.R. No. 478 of 1902). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunila maṭant Aiyum poṟceyap pāvaiyuñ cīrttanic celviyu n=ta ṉ perun=te viyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutiyal lūḻiyil liṭaituṟaiñāṭu n=tu ṭar vaṉavelip paṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻ matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumaraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭal liḻattaraicar tammuṭiyu māṅkavar teviyar roṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉnavarpakkal teṉnavar vaitta cun=ta ramuṭiyu min=ti ranāramum teṉṟicai I(ḻ)ḻa maṇṭalamuḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāvaṟ palpaḻantivum ceruviṟ cinavil Irupattorukā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cān=ti maṟṟi varaṇ karuti yiruttiya cempoṟ ṟiruntakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika mucaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta cayaciṅka ṉaḷapperum pukaḻḻoṭum piṭiyal yiraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamum navanetik kulaperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavīrac cakkarakoṭṭamum mutiravaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷar nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilaivīrar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaipaḻaṉa mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkīrtti Āti
nakaravaiyil can=ti ran ṟolkulat tin=ti rarataṉai viḷaiyamarkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉak kuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣai yamum pūcirarcer nalkocalaiñāṭu n=ta ṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolait taṇṭapputtiyu miraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākki tikkaṉai kirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=ta can=ta ṉ māviḻin=to ṭat taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaḻal caṅkoṭṭal ma hivāḷaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal liyāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭal luttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tīrtta teṟipunal kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷ palakalañ celutti caṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅkapaṉmanākiya kaṭārattaraicaṉai vākaiyamporukaṭaṟ kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyil piṟakkiya perunetip piṟakkamum Ārttavaṉnaka(r)ṉakar poṟṟoḻilvāca(l)lil viccātirattoraṇamum moyttoḻil puṉaimaṇip putavamum kaṉamaṇik katavamum niṟai cīrvicaiyamum tuṟaiñir paṉṉaiyum naṉmalaiyūraiyil teṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭal lakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkā valviṉai yilaṅkācokamum kāppoṟu niṟaipunal māppappāḷamum kāvalampuricai mevali
paṅkamum viḷaippattūṟuṭai vaḷaippattūṟum kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaitakkolamum ti(r)tamāvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamum k(ā)lāmuli kaṭun=ti ṟal lilāmulitecamum toṭukaṭalkāva(ka)l kaṭumuraṭ kiṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanma ṟku yāṇṭu 18Āvatu maturān=ta kavaḷanāṭṭu Āṭaiyūrnāṭṭu Āṭaiyūr tiruvaṇṇāmalaiuṭaiyār tirumuṟṟatte śrīrājentra coḻaṉcālai Uṇṇa tiruvaṇṇāmalai śaṇḍeśva rateva(r)riṭai koṇṭa poṉ nāṟpatiṉ kaḻañcu koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu . Eṅkaḷūr vaṭakkil Erikiḻ kiḻpārkkellai paḷḷiccan=ta m Ūrpotuvāyk kiṭan=ta paṭṭikku meṟkum melpārkkellai paḷḷiccan=ta m Iṟaṅkina Ūrpotuvāykkiṭan=ta paṭṭikku kiḻakkum teṉpārkkellai Ūrnattattoṭum Aṭain=ta vāykkālukku vaṭakku vaṭapārkkellai Iraviīśva ramuṭaiya ma haāde var nilam tāṉṟippaṭṭikku teṟkum naṭuvuḷppaṭṭa perunāṉkellai nila n=ta ṭi yeṭṭināṟ ṟaṇkiṭappai nila ṉāṟumāvum Iṉṉilattin melvarampāl van=ta Iraṇ ṭāṭikkiṇaṟu mikutik kuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka Iṉnilattāl van=ta Iṟaiyum nikki kaṟaiyu maṟṟum mepperppaṭṭitu nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkakkaṭavomākavum Eriyiluṅ kā
lilu nīrkkiyn=ta vaṇṇam nir pāccappeṟuvatākavum Iṉṉila muḻuvār Eṅkaḷur nattattile kuṭiyirukkappeṟuvatākavum Innilattāl van=ta Iṟai koḷḷappeṟātomākavum Ippari coṭṭi viṟṟukkuṭuttom tiruvaṇṇāmalai caṇḍeśva ratevaṟku Āṭaiyūr Ūrom . Innāṭṭu Āṭaiyūrnāṭṭuc coṟiyāṉa rājentra coḻanallū rūrom śrīrājentra coḻaccālai Uṇṇa tiruvaṇṇāmalai caṇṭeśva ratevariṭai koṇṭa poṉ nāṟpatiṉ kaḻañcum koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu . Eṅkaḷur vaṭakki lerikkiḻ koṉṟaiettattu- kku kiḻpārkkellai Ivvūr rāje ntra coḻaiśva ramuṭaiya ma haātevar tirunan=ta- vāṉattukkum Ampalappaṭṭikkum mukkiyenṉum varavaikku meṟkkum teṉpārkkellai ceppettattukkut tuṇainilamāka Iṭṭa kiḻaṉmelāyk kiṭakkum varavaikkum vaṭakkil nālaṭiyil kiḻaivaravaiyil kiḻvarampukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai vaṭakkil nālāṭiyil vaṭavarampukkum cakkiliyaṉkuṇṭilukkum perunāṉkellai nattattil nāṟukālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai pocanettattukku teṉvarampukkut teṟkkum naṭuvupaṭṭa paṉikkayameṉṉuñ ceṟuvum Oṭaiyu muṭpaṭṭat ta nāl paṭṭi Oṉṟum Innila
ttuḷ kiṇaṟu Iraṇṭum Innilattuppaṭum Ūrnattattu toṭṭakkiṇaṟum Innilavopāti puñcai nilamum Innila muḻuvāṉ Eṅkaḷur nattatte kuṭi Iṟaikoḷḷappeṟātomākavum Innilattukku Eriyilum kālilum nirkkin=ta vaṇṇam nir pāccap peṟuvatākavum Innilattāl van=ta nīrk kiṟaiyum koḷḷappeṟātomāka Iṟaiyili viṟṟukkuṭuttom tiruvaṇṇāmalai śaṇḍeśvara tevaṟkku coṟi Āṉa rājentra coḻanallūrūrom . Innāṭṭu maicāṟṟūrom tiruvaṇṇāmalai ca[ ṇḍeśva ra] tevariṭai koṇṭa poṉ nāṟpatiṉ kaḻañcum koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu . Ivvūr ciṟiyaūru(ṇ)ṇieṉṉum paṭṭikkuk kiḻpārkkellai Ūrnattattukku meṟkku teṉpārkkellai vañcikoṉaṉ puliyaṉ nilattukku vaṭakku melpārkkellai coṇan Aṇṇāvan cāttakolamum Aṇṇāvaṉ varun=ta ṉumuṭaiya moṭṭaceṟuvukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai Atirāmaṉ kūttāṭi nilattukku teṟkku naṭuvupaṭṭa taṭi munṟum Innilattukkuppaṭum Iraṇṭaṭṭukku kiḻpārkellai Atiirāman kūttāṭiyum ceṭṭi Urumiṭiyum nilattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai Aṇṇāvaṉ � vaykun=ta nuñ ceṭṭi Urumiṭiyu nilattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai
vañcikkoṉ puliyaṉ nilattukku kiḻakku vaṭapārkkellai vañcikkon puliyan nilattukku teṟkkum naṭuvupaṭṭa taṭi Āṟum Iṉnilattukkuppaṭum muṉṟām Aṭṭukkuk kiḻpārkkellai Ūrpotuvāy kiṭakkum nilattukku meṟku tenpārkkellai Ālan=tu ṟai Araicaṭikaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattu vaṭakku Atiraāman kūttāṭi Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukkuk kiḻakku vaṭapārkkellai Ūrppotuvāy kiṭakkum nilattukku teṟkkum naṭuvupaṭṭa taṭi Aiñcum Ākat taṭi patinālināl paṭṭi Oṉṟu Innilattāl van=ta toṭṭakkiṇaṟum puñcainilamum Innilattukku Eriyilum kālilum nīrpāccappeṟuvatākavum Innilattāl van=ta nirk kiṟai koḷḷappeṟātomāka Iṟaiiḻicci viṟṟukkuṭuttom tiruvaṇṇāmalai śaṇḍeśva ratevaṟku maicāṟṟuū(r)rom . Innāṭṭu māttūrāna Eṟipattikaṇṭanallūrom tiruvaṇṇāmalai śaṇḍeśva ratevariṭai koṇṭa poṉ nāṟpatiṉ kaḻañcu koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷur māmalaittukku tenpārkkellai teṟkil meṭṭukkālukkum vaṭakkil vāykkālukkum vaṭakku melpārkkellai Araiyakaḷātittaṉ ṉennum ceṟuvukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai vaṭakki
ltūmpil teṟkil vāykkālukku teṟkum kiḻpārkkellai viḷāṉṉennuñ ceṟuvukkum Amaraṉkaṇṇāṟṟuk kaṭainilattukku meṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa taṭi nālināl paṭṭi Oṉṟum Innilattukku Eṅka ḷeriyilum kālilum nirk kiyn=ta vaṇṇam nir pāccappeṟuvatākavum Innilattāl van=ta Iṟaiyum nirk kiṟaiyum koḷḷappeṟātomāka Iṟaiyiḻicci viṟṟukkuṭuttom tiruvaṇṇāmalai śaṇḍeśvaratevaṟkku māttūrāna Eṟipattikaṇṭanallūrom . Iṉnāṭṭu peṇṇai vaṭakarai kuḷakkuṭiūrom tiruvaṇṇāmalai [śaṇḍeśva ra] teva(r)riṭaik koṇṭa poṉ Eṇpatin kaḻañcuṅ koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu . Eṅkaḷur melaierikiḻ kiḻpārkkellai Iluppaiyoṭukaṇṇā ṟeṉṟu per kūvappaṭum nilattukku meṟku tenpārkkellai Ivvūr Eriyilniṉṟu kiḻakkunokkip ponta peruvāykkālukku vaṭakku melpā(ā)ṟkellai koṭupunava namutaṉ cāttanuḻum kaṇṇā ṟeṉṟu per kūvappaṭum nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai paḻaiya Ūrnattattukku vaṭakkil Ūrnattattukku teṟkum Ivvicain=ta perunāṉkellaiyilum naṭuvuḷpaṭṭa nilaṉ taṭi patināṟināl mikutikkuṟai vuḷḷaṭaṅka taṉkiṭappai nilam Iraṇṭupaṭṭiyum Innilattu
kku Eṅkaḷ Eriyilum kāli(l)lum nīrk kin=ta vaṇṇam nir pāccappeṟuvatākavum Innilattāl van=ta nirkku Iṟaiyum maṟṟum Epp(o)rpaṭṭatum koḷḷappeṟātomāka Iṟaiyiḻicci viṟṟukkuṭuttom tiruvaṇṇāmalai śaṇḍeśvara- tevaṟku kuḷakkuṭiū(r)rom .
Digital edition of SII 8.67 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
